message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #999999
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
  NoteBorderColor #666666
}

participant Client
participant TEAPServer
participant MASA

Client <- TEAPServer : EAP-Request/\nType=Identity
Client -> TEAPServer : EAP-Response/\nType=Identity

note left of Client
(1)
end note
Client <- TEAPServer : EAP-Request/\nType=TEAP,\nTEAP Start,\nAuthority-ID TLV
Client -> TEAPServer : EAP-Response/\nType=TEAP,\nTLS(ClientHello)

Client <- TEAPServer : EAP-Request/\nType=TEAP,\nTLS(ServerHello,\nCertificate,\nServerKeyExchange,\nCertificateRequest,\nServerHelloDone)
Client -> TEAPServer : EAP-Response/\nType=TEAP,\nTLS(Certificate,\nClientKeyExchange,\nCertificateVerify,\nChangeCipherSpec,\nFinished)

Client <- TEAPServer : EAP-Request/\nType=TEAP,\nTLS(ChangeCipherSpec,\nFinished),\n{Crypto-Binding TLV,\nResult TLV=Success}
Client -> TEAPServer : EAP-Response/\n,Type=TEAP,\n{Crypto-Binding TLV,\nResult TLV=Success}

note over Client, TEAPServer
At this stage the outer TLS tunnel is established
The following message exchanges are for BRSKI
end note

note left of Client
(2)
end note
Client <- TEAPServer : EAP-Request/\nType=TEAP,\n{Request-Action TLV:\nStatus=Failure,\nAction=Process-TLV,\nTLV=Request-Voucher,\nTLV=Trusted-Server-Root,\nTLV=CSR-Attributes,\nTLV=PKCS#10}

note left of Client
(3)
end note
Client -> TEAPServer : EAP-Response/\nType=TEAP,\n{Request-Voucher TLV}

TEAPServer -> MASA : RequestVoucher
TEAPServer <- MASA : Voucher

note left of Client
(4)
end note
Client <- TEAPServer : EAP-Request/\nType=TEAP,\n{Voucher TLV}
Client -> TEAPServer : EAP-Response/\nType=TEAP,{Trusted-Server-Root TLV}

note left of Client
(5)
end note
Client <- TEAPServer : EAP-Request/\nType=TEAP,\n{Trusted-Server-Root TLV}
Client -> TEAPServer : EAP-Response/\nType=TEAP,{CSR-Attributes TLV}

Client <- TEAPServer : EAP-Request/\nType=TEAP,\n{CSR-Attributes TLV}

@enduml
